productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Terra Lea Brown Sandal
description: Get ready to float away in comfort with these floaters from adidas. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail.UpperSynthetic leather with stitch detailing and mesh for lightweight comfort and breathabilitySynthetic uppers with forefoot and ankle straps, coupled with velcro fasteners for easy adjustment to attain a snug FitCollar strap with cushioned pad to prevent chafing and formation of blistersCushioned inners for greater comfortMidsoleFootbed with acupressure points for soft massage feel and stimulation of the blood cellsOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional pattern for greater traction Flex grooves for natural movement of the feetLugs on the outsole provide greater durabilityWash careRub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine was
